Crypto & Forex Signals — Human + AI Powered

Join Signals

What Are Signals?

Signals are real-time instructions that take the guesswork out of trading.

Which asset to trade

Exact coin, pair, or asset to focus on

Target sell levels

Clear profit-taking targets

Entry price

Optimal point to enter the trade

Stop loss

Protection to manage downside risk

You can act on them manually or set them up for automation.

What a live signal looks like

So you know exactly what to expect when you join.

BTC/USDT Signal

Long
Entry
$67,150 - $67,350
Target 1
$67,900
Target 2
$68,650
Target 3
$69,500
Target 4
$70,600
Stop Loss
$66,250
Analysis:

Strong support holding in the entry zone with improving momentum. RSI is recovering from oversold on the 4H chart.

Disclaimer

Trading decisions are yours alone. AltGuru Signals is not liable for any loss or harm arising from how you use or ignore anything we publish—on this site, in Telegram, or elsewhere. By using our materials, you agree you do so at your own risk.

Nothing we share is personalized financial or investment advice. Our trade ideas and calls are commentary and education: we document how we approach the market and share that process for learning. We will never ask to manage your funds, hold custody of your assets, or trade on your behalf.
